title: I Found The Phrase To Every Thought
content:
I found the phrase to every thought
    I ever had, but one;
    And that defies me, -- as a hand
    Did try to chalk the sun

    To races nurtured in the dark; --
    How would your own begin?
    Can blaze be done in cochineal,
    Or noon in mazarin?
meaning:
"I Found The Phrase To Every Thought" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
